compiled_state.title: ticket CLI: query commands on stale local tickets branch -> out-of-sync results
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Expected Behavior

When running ticket CLI commands (ticket list, ticket show, ticket deps, sprint-list-epics.sh), the results reflect the latest state from origin/tickets. The local tickets branch in .tickets-tracker/ should be automatically synced with origin/tickets before returning results.

## Actual Behavior

The local tickets branch can diverge from origin/tickets (observed: 72 local commits ahead, 16 remote commits behind). Ticket commands return stale data — missing edits, new stories, preplanning results, and comments that exist on the remote. This caused a brainstorm session to start from scratch on an epic that had already been fully refined and preplanned in a prior session.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start a new session in a worktree where the local tickets branch has not been synced
2. Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket show bf53-e015
3. Observe that the description and children are stale (missing edits and stories from remote)
4. Manually run: cd .tickets-tracker && git fetch origin tickets && git merge origin/tickets --no-edit
5. Re-run ticket show — now shows the updated content

## Workaround

Manual sync: cd .tickets-tracker && git fetch origin tickets && git merge origin/tickets --no-edit
